MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, C.B. PATEL, R.B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-10-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-22-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 3, JUDGE J.ORR, CSR S.NAYLOR, CLERK E.MONTI 3:30 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ARNOLD EVJE APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT IN PRO PER. BOTH PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT DEFT MAY RE- MAIN AT THE PREMISES UNDER THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR R&P OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 140 JONES ST.#504, SF. DEFT TO PAY $90.00 EACH SATURDAY FOR THE SUCCEEDING WEEK, STARTING ON 2-12-94. DEFT TO PAY $367.25 ON 2-15-94, $367.25 ON 3-15-94 AND $345.50 ON 4-15-94. IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE ANY PAYMENTS, ENTIRE BALANCE IS DUE IMMEDIATE- LY AND PLTF TO MAKE AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSS. LEASE FORFEITED. EDDIE CARLOS MORALES IS DEEMED NOT A TENANT & DOES NOT CLAIM A RIGHT TO POSSESS THE PROPERTY. TOTAL DAMAGES ARE $1080.00.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, AMANDA AKA AMANDA HERNANDEZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 JONES ST. #504 $1,080.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT MAY REMAIN AT THE PREMISES UNDER THE FOLLOWING CONDI- TIONS: DEFT TO PAY $90.00 EACH SATURDAY FOR THE SUCCEEDING WEEK, STARTING 2-12-94. DEFT TO PAY $367.25 ON 2-15-94, $367.25 ON 3-15-94 & $345.50 ON 4-15-94. IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE ANY PAYMENTS, ENTIRE BALANCE DUE & WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED.
